findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "register_account" references sensitive artifacts (password, authorization, bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Create a new EQVPS customer account with first_name, last_name, email. Returns a bearer `token` — store it and send it as `Authorization: Bearer <token>` on eve…

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "login" references sensitive artifacts (password, authorization, bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Log in with email + password. Returns a bearer `token` to send as `Authorization: Bearer <token>` on subsequent requests.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "whoami" references sensitive artifacts (bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Return the authenticated account profile (id, name, email). Use to verify the bearer token is valid.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "order_vps" references sensitive artifacts (ssh_key). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Order a VPS. `product` = plan slug from list_plans; `os_id` = an OS id from that plan's images. Optional `hostname` and `ssh_key` (public key — strongly recomme…

findings.title: Read-only tool requests dangerous parameters
findings.detail: Tool "order_vps" appears informational but accepts parameters (ssh_key) that enable code/file/secret access.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "get_vps_status" references sensitive artifacts (password). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Get full detail for one VPS: status, specs, live VM state/uptime, and SSH access info (host, port, ready-to-paste `command`). On first call for a keyless server…

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "reset_password" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: DESTRUCTIVE to access — the OLD root password STOPS WORKING immediately. REQUIRES confirm = exact hostname (from get_vps_status) or 'DELETE'. Agent must confirm…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

evidence.snippet: DESTRUCTIVE — all data is lost. REQUIRES confirm = exact hostname (from get_vps_status) or 'DELETE'. Agent must explicitly confirm with the human before calling…
